raw_consumer_statement:
My credit card information was used to charge close to {$4000.00} in charges from a furniture store in XXXX, California on XX/XX/XXXX. I never used my credit card at this store, nor have I been there. The card was used fraudulently and this fraud was discovered on XX/XX/XXXX. 

Citibank, the issuer of the credit card, never called, texted, or otherwise tried to contact me about this purchase. I do not have a history of purchasing furniture on my credit card, which means that in addition to the high amount, the type of purchase was suspicious, and Citibank should have reached out to confirm what ultimately is a fraudulent charge. On XX/XX/XXXX I promptly disputed the charge and reported it to Citibank.
